ingredients.text: Sow Stall Free Australian Pork Belly

ingredients.alim_nom_eng: Salt, white (sea, igneous or rock), iodine added, no fluride added

ingredients_text: Sow Stall Free Australian Pork Belly (80%), Tonkatsu Sauce (20%) [Brown Sugar, Apple, Tomato Paste, Water, Vinegar, Honey, Modified Maize Starch, Salt, Carrot, Celery, Molasses, Ginger Purée, Natural Colour (Caramel 1), Garlic, Spices (Cayenne Pepper, Cinnamon, Cloves, White Pepper), Onion Powder, Garlic Powder, Acidity Regulator (330)]. ALLERGY ADVICE: May contain wheat, gluten, milk.
